title: Exact Coordinate Geometry Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: coordinate geometry exact replay educational row
solver_reuse.pressure: The current rows are satisfiable midpoint, collinearity, and squared-distance witnesses; they are useful exact replay examples but do not yet create a distinct solver-regression conflict.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a false collinearity, midpoint, distance, or incidence row with a source-linked QF_LRA/NRA artifact; keep broad synthetic, projective, and differential geometry theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode midpoint and incidence checks as deterministic QF_LRA formulas.
Encode squared-distance checks as deterministic NRA-shadow formulas with exact replay.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Add non-incidence and rigid-configuration examples once proof routes for polynomial constraints are explicit.
